rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope only when binding implementation-level outputs or subcomponent behavior.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component type and implementation boundaries when placing AGREE annexes.
Only reference visible features or explicitly declared variables in AGREE contracts; avoid internal subcomponent paths in type scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'annex agree {** ... **};' for all AGREE content, and place assignments only in implementation annexes.
Boolean range conditions should be declared via 'eq' helper variables before use in guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as variables in AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants.
Never use subcomponent port paths in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement for requirements without implementation bindings
